creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Experiencing this issue on a Dell XPS M1530 with a new installation of FreeBSD 10.1, ZFS on root and encrypted.

zfsboot: error 1 lba 64
zfsboot: error 1 lba 0
zfsboot: No ZFS pools located, can't boot

Booting a shell from my installation media and running "zpool import" lists the bootpool and zroot pools as expected.

Not sure I have anything else to contribute that wasn't already mentioned.
